settings.title: Settings
settings.makeAppWork: Make {appName} work the way you want it to.
settings.languageInfo: Choose the language for the user interface.
settings.defaultZapInfo: The default amount of sats to use when sending a lightning tip.
settings.platformZapInfo: How much you'd like to tip the developer of {appName} whenever you send a zap.
settings.sendDelayInfo: A delay period allowing you to cancel a reply or note creation, in seconds.
settings.proofOfWorkInfo: Add a proof-of-work stamp to your notes to increase your reach.
settings.maxRelaysInfo: This controls how many relays to max out at when loading feeds and event context. More is faster, but will require more bandwidth and processing power.
settings.authenticateRelaysInfo: Allows {appName} to authenticate with relays that have access controls automatically.
settings.blossomInfo: Enter one or more urls for blossom compatible nostr media servers.
settings.dufflepudInfo: Enter a custom url for {appName}'s helper application. Dufflepud is used for hosting images and loading link previews.
settings.imgproxyInfo: Enter a custom imgproxy url for resizing images on the fly to reduce bandwidth and improve privacy.
settings.reportAnalyticsInfo: Keep this enabled if you would like developers to be able to know what features are used, and to diagnose and fix bugs.
settings.clientFingerprintingInfo: If this is turned on, public notes you create will have a "client" tag added. This helps with troubleshooting, and allows other people to find out about {appName}.

login.title: Log In
login.ownsIdentity: , which allows you to own your social identity.
login.bunkerDescription: To log in using a remote signer, scan the QR code below or enter a connection link.
login.bunkerTooltip: Click to copy the connection string to your signer app
login.invalidPublicKey: Sorry, but that's an invalid public key.
login.noRelays: That connection string doesn't have any relays.
login.connectSearching: We're searching for your profile on the network.
login.connectFailed: We're having a hard time finding your profile.
login.skipWarning: , but be aware that your profile and relays may not get properly synchronized.
login.selectRelaysHint: If you'd like to select your relays manually instead, click
login.customRelayDescription: If you know which relay your profile is on, you can enter it below.
login.invalidRelayUrl: Please enter a valid relay url

onboarding.getAcquainted: Take a moment to get acquainted with {appName} — or skip straight to account setup.
onboarding.learnProtocol: Learn about the protocol at your own pace by watching one of our tutorial videos.
onboarding.readyClick: When you're ready, click below and we'll guide you through the process of creating an account.
onboarding.nstartDescription: To get you started, we'll redirect you to an app called nstart, which will guide you through the process of creating and securely storing your account keys.
onboarding.nstartHelp: Nstart will also help you fill out your social profile, then when you're done you'll be sent back here to finish setting up your account.
onboarding.pickCategory: Pick a category to find some people to follow, or click
onboarding.peopleYouFollowDescription: These are the people you'll be following once you finish creating your account.
onboarding.relaysDescription: Relays are where content on nostr lives. Connecting to different relays can result in a different experience.
onboarding.askNostr: If you have any questions, just use the #asknostr hashtag — people are always happy to lend a hand.
onboarding.introduceYourself: Now is a great time to introduce yourself to the Nostr network!
onboarding.calculatingPow: Hang on tight, we're calculating proof of work...

actions.powCost: This event cost {pow} bits of work

channel.notConfiguredDescription: In order to deliver messages, Coracle needs to know where to send them. Please visit your
channel.setUpRelays: and set up your messaging relays.
channel.noMessagingRelays: does not have messaging relays, which means they may not be able to receive DMs.
channel.noMessagingRelaysPlural: do not have messaging relays, which means they may not be able to receive DMs.
channel.yourNoRelays: You don't have any messaging relays set up yet, which will make it difficult for you to receive replies to this conversation. Click
channel.yourNoRelaysEnd: to set up your messaging relays.

zen.noWalletDescription: This user has not set up their MULTIPASS or ZEN Card. They cannot receive ZEN from likes.
zen.usageDesc: Service credits: likes, relay usage, AI
zen.propertyDesc: Cooperative shares (3x1/3 distributed) - Renewal via G1society
